---
title: 'xiao2023: A Regime Shift in North Pacific Annual Mean Sea Surface Temperature in 2013/14'
created: 2026-03-27
last_modified: 2026-07-06 23:21:38
---

---

- citation_key: xiao2023
- title: A Regime Shift in North Pacific Annual Mean Sea Surface Temperature in 2013/14
- author: Dong Xiao, Hong-Li Ren
- journal: Frontiers in Earth Science
- year: 2023
- doi: 10.3389/feart.2022.987349

## Notes

Sea Surface Temperature (SST) in the North Pacific (NP) has experienced a
regime shift in 2013/14, with a significant increase in the annual mean SST.

Not related to PDO and IPO, but Victoria Mode, which is defined as the second
EOF mode of the annual mean SST in the NP, and is characterized by a horseshoe
pattern of SST anomalies.

Says that might indicate hiatus is over.
